creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
> The FTP structure is also available for bootonly.iso installers.

Maybe just delete that single-sentence paragraph? 

Whilst there's /ftp/ within the URL, it's now https. 

----

In a later paragraph: 

> … The FTP directory …

It's true that URLs such as <ftp://ftp.uk.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/snapshots/amd64/14.0-CURRENT> remain usable, however there's probably (strong) encouragement to steer people away from FTP as a protocol. 

----

I can't think of any other possible improvement to the page. For me dragging this out, you have permission to punish me with something more brutal than the commit bit :-)
